question: What types of messages should users be able to send—text only, or also images, files, voice messages, and video? And should the app support both one-on-one and group conversations?
oracle_answer: Users should be able to send text, images, videos, and files to share various forms of content. As for conversations, yes, the app should support both one-on-one communication (adding friends) and group conversations (creating groups) so users can connect with others in different ways.

middleware_events.message: Ask only one focused question this turn. Split compound questions.

question: What visual style or theme should the messaging app have—for example, a clean minimalist design with light colors, a dark mode option, or a specific color scheme and branding?
oracle_answer: I prefer the background color to be light blue and all elements to be dark blue.
